Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Greg Groeneveld, Esq., of Law Offices of Greg Groeneveld Tel: 415 308 3637 for plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing is Held. Plaintiff's counsel did not contest the tentative ruling and appeared solely for purposes of clarification. Counsel further requested that the Court include an additional paragraph in the proposed order.

"The order shall be personally served upon the judgment debtor and shall contain a notice to the judgment debtor that failure to comply with the order may subject the judgment debtor to being held in contempt of court."

The matter was discussed, and upon conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopted the tentative ruling with modifications as follows:

PLAINTIFF REGINA PACHECO's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order. Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Therefor the following is ordered:

(1) Any funds, up to the amount of $227,318.43, held by Ann Wicks, esq and/or Withersworldwide a/k/a Withers Bergman LLP for Judgment Debtor Ari Qayumi are assigned to Judgment Creditor Regina Pacheco pursuant to the provisions of C.C.P. 708.510 et seq.

(2) Judgment Debtor Ari Qayumi is ordered to direct her counsel Ann Wicks, esq and Withersworldwide a/k/a Withers Bergman LLP to transfer the funds held by them for her up to the amount of $227,318.43 to Counsel for Judgment Creditor Regina Pacheco - Greg Groeneveld, esq.

(3) Ann Wicks, esq and Withersworldwide a/k/a Withers Bergman LLP is ordered to transfer any funds, up to the amount of $227,318.43 which they hold for Ari Qayumi to Counsel for Judgment Creditor Regina Pacheco (Greg Groeneveld, esq.) for the benefit of Judgment Creditor Regina Pacheco pursuant to the provisions of C.C.P. 708.510 et seq.

(4) Judgment Debtor Ari Qayumi is ordered not to assign or otherwise dispose of any rights to the funds up to the amount of $227,318.43 her attorney Ann Wicks, esq and/or Withersworldwide a/k/a Withers Bergman LLP holds for Judgment Debtor Ari Qayumi.

This Order shall be personally served on Ari Qayumi. Ari Qayumi is notified that if she fails to comply with this order she may be subject to arrest and punishment for contempt of court. CCP 708.520(d)."

Order is Signed.
